content:
# UNet-Based Underwater Enhancement Model Survey — WaterNet Challengers (2026-04-01)

## Context
Surveyed underwater image enhancement models to find a UNet-based challenger to the current WaterNet baseline (~1M params, 3.7s/frame CPU at 1024px). Constraint: RTX 3060 with 6GB VRAM. FUnIE-GAN was previously evaluated but results weren't satisfactory. "MarineNN by Pavan Kumar" was requested but does not exist in any public repository, paper, or preprint — name could not be verified.

## Models With Code AND Pretrained Weights (Usable for POC)

### 1. Five A+ Network (FA+Net) — BMVC 2023 ⭐ TOP PICK
- **Params**: ~9K (112x smaller than WaterNet)
- **Speed**: ~0.01s/frame — real-time at 1080p
- **Architecture**: Two-stage UNet-like. Prior stage decomposes degradation into sub-problems; fine-grained stage uses multi-branch color enhancement + pixel attention.
- **Weights**: Yes — two variants (α=0.1, α=0.4) in model/ folder
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/Owen718/FiveAPlus-Network
- **Paper**: arXiv:2305.08824
- **VRAM**: Trivial (<0.1GB). Model is ~36KB.
- **UIEB trained**: Yes
- **Why interesting**: Claims SOTA on multiple benchmarks with 9K params. Real-time 1080p. The extreme efficiency is the opposite end of the spectrum from WaterNet.

### 2. RAUNE-Net — IFTC 2023
- **Params**: Unknown (moderate, UNet-based with residual + attention)
- **Architecture**: Wide-range perception module, attention down-sampling, high-level feature residual learning, feature map smoothing + Tanh output
- **Weights**: Yes — pretrained models for RAUNE-Net, WaterNet, UGAN, FUnIE-GAN included
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/fansuregrin/RAUNE-Net
- **Trained on**: LSUI3879 dataset (3,879 pairs)
- **VRAM**: Should fit 6GB easily (standard UNet scale)
- **Why interesting**: Trained on a larger/different dataset than UIEB. Attention mechanisms may handle color correction differently than WaterNet.

### 3. UIE-WD (Wavelet Dual-Stream) — ICASSP 2022
- **Architecture**: Discrete wavelet transform decomposes input into frequency bands, separate streams for structure and detail
- **Weights**: Yes — Google Drive, goes in ./checkpoints/
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/ZZiyin/UIE-WD_Code
- **Tested on**: RTX 2070 (fits 6GB easily)
- **Trained on**: NYU Depth V2 synthesized underwater (1449 base images × 36 augmentations)
- **Why interesting**: Wavelet decomposition approach is architecturally different from direct pixel-space UNets. May handle detail preservation differently.

### 4. UIEC²-Net — Signal Processing: Image Communication 2021
- **Architecture**: Three-block CNN — RGB pixel-level block (denoise/decast), HSV global-adjust block (saturation/brightness), attention map block
- **Weights**: Yes — via ddz16/UIE_Benckmark or BIGWangYuDong/UWEnhancement
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/ddz16/UIE_Benckmark (includes NU2Net, UIEC2Net, UWCNN checkpoints)
- **Also**: https://github.com/BIGWangYuDong/UWEnhancement (PyTorch ports)
- **VRAM**: Lightweight, fits 6GB
- **Why interesting**: Dual color-space approach (RGB + HSV). May handle saturation/brightness differently than WaterNet's single-space approach.

## Models Without Pretrained Weights (Not Usable for Quick POC)

| Model | Year | Params | Code? | Weights? | Note |
|-------|------|--------|-------|----------|------|
| LU2Net | 2024 | 176K | No | No | Benchmarked on RTX 3060 at 100fps but unreleased |
| MUFFNet | 2025 | 2.2M | No | No | Multi-scale frequency, no release |
| OUNet-JL | 2025 | 7.1M | Yes | No | Would require training from scratch at 128x128 |
| ViT-ClarityNet | 2025 | ~350M | No | No | Too large, marginal on 6GB |
| CPDM | 2024 | 121M | Yes | No | Diffusion model, too slow for video pipeline |
| LSNet (7K) | 2024 | 7K | No | No | Transmission map prior, no code released |

## Recommendation for POC
1. **Five A+ Network** — strongest candidate. 9K params, real-time, weights available, UIEB-trained. Extreme lightweight could mean less correction power, but worth testing.
2. **RAUNE-Net** — good second candidate. Attention-driven UNet, different training data (LSUI3879), weights available.
3. **UIEC²-Net** — interesting dual color-space approach, weights available via benchmark repo.

## Evaluation Plan (if proceeding)
- Same 3 test frames as previous evaluation (3840x2160 DJI Action 4, deep/turbid water, resized to 1024px)
- Metrics: R/G ratio, B/G ratio, saturation, noise (σ delta), black/white clipping, visual quality
- Compare against WaterNet baseline + WaterNet+ambiance pipeline
- CPU and GPU timing at 1024px
